history.qwen_observation: OpenRewrite plugin threw IllegalAccessError due to a classloader isolation bug in rewrite-migrate-java when executing UpgradePluginsForJava21.
history.qwen_rationale: The IllegalAccessError is a known internal classloader conflict in the rewrite-maven-plugin/rewrite-migrate-java versions used. Removing the problematic UpgradePluginsForJava21 step avoids the bug, as UpgradeBuildToJava21 already handles the maven-compiler-plugin and source/target properties needed for Java 21.

history.qwen_observation: The rewrite-maven-plugin 6.40.0 throws an IllegalAccessError when loading Guava migration recipes under JDK 21 due to classloader/module restrictions.
history.qwen_rationale: Splitting the JDK bump into two steps avoids the compile mismatch and bypasses the classloader bug. Step 1 runs under JDK 17 to safely update the java.version property and compiler plugin version. Step 2 runs under JDK 21 to set compiler source/target to 21 and apply Java 21 code transforms, leveraging ChangePropertyValue to avoid triggering the buggy UpgradeBuildToJava21 recipe.

history.qwen_observation: Recipe application failed with IllegalAccessError in rewrite-maven-plugin:6.40.0 due to a classloader conflict involving Guava migration recipes.
history.qwen_rationale: The custom chain triggered a known classloader bug in the OpenRewrite plugin. Switching to the empirical default template for Java 17→21 avoids custom property mutations and Guava-related recipes, relying instead on the stable meta-recipes that handle plugin and build upgrades safely under the correct JDK versions.

history.qwen_observation: The rewrite-maven-plugin 6.40.0 throws an IllegalAccessError in Guava-related classes during initialization, blocking all recipe execution.
history.qwen_rationale: Bypass the broken OpenRewrite plugin initialization by using a POM_PATCH step to directly force the maven-compiler-plugin to a JDK 21-compatible version. Then run the Java 21 source transforms, which do not depend on the problematic Guava classes and should execute successfully under the patched build configuration.
